author: axxs
description: List upcoming live music gigs for a place. Aggregates Tasguide (Tasmanian gig guide), Humanitix (community ticketing), and Ticketmaster's free Discovery API into a single deduped feed. Bundled with a Tasmania region pack out of the box.
install_msg: Giglist loaded. Default region is `tasmania`. Try `[p]giglist hobart` or `[p]giglistplaces`. To enable Ticketmaster (free, 5000 calls/day): get a Consumer Key at https://developer.ticketmaster.com and set it with `[p]giglistset ticketmaster_key <key>`.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store data about individual end users. The bundled region pack (place names, source URLs/slugs) ships read-only with the cog; no per-guild state is persisted.
